digitalOnly.title: Digital Services Only
digitalOnly.description: All services provided by ARVIX PTE. LTD. are digital services, including SaaS subscriptions, web development, mobile app development, and technical consulting. We do not ship or deliver any physical goods.

saas.title: SaaS Subscription Services
saas.description: Activated immediately after successful payment, accessible via online platform.

development.title: Web/App Development
development.description: Delivered via code repositories (GitHub/GitLab) or secure file transfer.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting Services
consulting.description: Provided via video conferencing, phone calls, or email.

timeline.title: Delivery Timeline
timeline.description: Delivery timeline depends on service type and project scope, specified in the service agreement.

monthly.title: Monthly Subscriptions
monthly.description: Monthly subscriptions can be cancelled anytime. No refund for current month.

annual.title: Annual Subscriptions
annual.description: Annual subscriptions: refund remaining months within 30 days (pro-rated).

special.title: Special Circumstances
special.description: Additional compensation available for severe service outages exceeding SLA.

beforeStart.title: Before Project Start
beforeStart.description: Full deposit refund if project hasn't started within 7 days of signing.

inProgress.title: Project In Progress
inProgress.description: Pro-rated refund based on completed work, minus incurred costs.

completed.title: Project Completed
completed.description: No refund after project completion and source code delivery.

unused.title: Unused Credits
unused.description: Full refund for unused consulting credits within 30 days.

partial.title: Partially Used
partial.description: Used hours deducted at standard rate, remainder refunded.

used.title: Completed Sessions
used.description: No refund for completed sessions, but follow-up available within 7 days.

step1.title: Submit Request
step1.description: Email ern@xyvnai.com with order details and reason.

step2.title: Review Process
step2.description: We will review your request within 3-5 business days.

step3.title: Refund Issued
step3.description: Refund processed to original payment method within 7-14 business days.

contact.title: Have Questions?
contact.description: If you have any questions about our shipping or refund policies, please contact us.

footer.disclaimer: ARVIX PTE. LTD. reserves the right of final interpretation
